/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/ros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/ros2_total_demo/msg/object_pose__type_support.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
